response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 20 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the tenure floor, and his current work at Stripe touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role demands a recognized AI expert operating at Director-level IC scope — someone with deep, demonstrated AI product or platform authorship, ideally a graduate AI degree, and a track record of strategic advisory influence. Bogdan's AI exposure is recent and shallow, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and there is no evidence of the organizational gravitas, thought leadership at scale, or customer-advisory experience the role requires.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum
Active exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation frameworks at Stripe, showing engagement with the current AI tooling landscape
History of community knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects, a signal of the evangelism mindset the role values
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; credentials are a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts bachelor's, well below the preferred Master's/PhD bar
AI expertise is narrow and very recent — no demonstrated AI-powered products, platforms, or published AI thought leadership that would establish recognized expertise
No evidence of Director-level IC positioning, strategic customer or partner advisory work, or cross-organizational influence at the scope this principal role demands

key_factors.factor: Shallow AI expertise and no recognized AI track record
